faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Clifton, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Clifton range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Clifton?
faqs.answer: Clifton properties most commonly experience house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are attracted to warmth and often enter homes during cooler months, while camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces common in older Clifton homes.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Clifton can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within one to two weeks. We'll schedule follow-up visits as needed to ensure all crickets are removed and entry points are sealed.
